title: solanum sativum var. atropurpurascens
intro: Solanum sativum var. atropurpurascens, also known as Deadly Nightshade, is a plant species that belongs to the Solanaceae family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant contains tropane alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including pain relief, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Solanum sativum var. atropurpurascens include treating conditions such as migraine headaches, muscle spasms, and anxiety, although its use should be cautious due to its toxicity. Traditionally, herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and extracts, but its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional.
